testimonials.name: Chioma Okafor
testimonials.quote: I used to spend NGN 3,000 daily on Uber commute. Now with FeyRide, I spend half that amount and get to know wonderful people along the way!

testimonials.name: Ahmed Hassan
testimonials.quote: As a rider, FeyRide helped me offset my fuel costs significantly. I commute anyway, so why not earn some money while I'm at it?

testimonials.name: Tunde Adebayo
testimonials.quote: The safety verification process gave me confidence. I trust the people I ride with because they're equally vetted. Best commute app ever!

testimonials.name: Zainab Ibrahim
testimonials.quote: As a student with a tight budget, FeyRide is a lifesaver. I can now afford daily commute to campus without stress!
